cli.description: Real-time session health monitoring for Claude Code
cli.cmd.watch.desc: Live TUI dashboard for active sessions
cli.cmd.status.desc: Quick health check of your most recent session (no TUI)
cli.cmd.login.opt.device: Use device code flow instead of opening browser
cli.cmd.init.desc: Add the "## Knowledge" instruction to your AI tool's rules file
cli.cmd.sync.desc: Sync local knowledge to the hub (auto-memory, session handoffs, pending queue)
cli.cmd.doctor.desc: Check for cache degradation in recent sessions
cli.cmd.impact.desc: Show lifetime stats — what clauditor has caught for you
cli.cmd.activity.desc: Show recent clauditor actions — warnings injected, loops blocked, etc.
cli.cmd.calibrate.desc: Auto-calibrate rotation threshold from your session history
cli.cmd.report.desc: Show quota usage report — see where your tokens went
cli.cmd.report.opt.days: Number of days to look back
cli.cmd.time.desc: Analyze token usage by time of day — detect peak hour impact
cli.cmd.share.desc: Generate a shareable summary of your Claude Code usage
cli.cmd.sessions.desc: List recent sessions — see where your tokens went
cli.cmd.knowledge.desc: Show accumulated project knowledge (errors, file activity)
cli.cmd.suggestSkill.desc: Find repeating workflows and suggest saving them as skills
cli.cmd.hook.desc: Internal hook handlers (called by Claude Code)
cli.cmd.hook.userPromptSubmit.desc: UserPromptSubmit hook handler — blocks oversized sessions
cli.cmd.hook.preCompact.desc: PreCompact hook handler — saves context before compaction
cli.cmd.hook.postCompact.desc: PostCompact hook handler — captures Claude's own session summary
cli.cmd.handoffReport.desc: Measure information preservation of the last session handoff
cli.cmd.handoffReport.opt.transcript: Path to a specific transcript JSONL file
cli.cmd.handoffReport.opt.summary: Path to a specific handoff summary file
status.slowCache: ● Session is slow — cache is broken
status.slowCacheFix: → Run /clear in Claude Code, then re-state what you're working on.
status.contextFull: ● Context full — Claude is about to forget things
status.contextFullFix: → Start a fresh session. Save important context to CLAUDE.md first.
status.contextFillingFix: → Good time to wrap up and start a new session.
login.errNoRepo: ✗ Hub features require a git repo with a remote.
login.errNoRepoHint1: cd into your project directory, then run `clauditor login`.
login.errNoRepoHint2: If you just want hooks without hub sync, run `clauditor install`.
login.browserFallbackHint: If the browser didn't open, visit:
login.mcpPrompt: Set up MCP so Claude can query team knowledge mid-session? (Y/n)
login.mcpConfigured: ✓ MCP configured — start a new Claude Code session to use it
login.mcpConfiguredSettings: ✓ MCP configured via settings.json — start a new Claude Code session to use it
login.mcpManual: To set up MCP manually, run:
login.mcpLater: You can set up MCP later with:
login.syncNote: Knowledge will sync automatically during sessions on this project.
login.nextInit: Next: run `clauditor init` to wire your AI tool into team knowledge.
pickProject.errFetch: Failed to fetch projects from hub
pickProject.errNoProjects: No projects found. Ask your team admin to create one in the dashboard.
pickProject.prompt: Select a project to sync knowledge to:
init.whichTool: Which AI tool are you using?
init.noConfigFileClaudeDesktop: Claude Desktop has no per-project config file.
init.noConfigFileOther: Your tool has no per-project config file.
init.pasteHint: Paste this into your custom instructions or starter prompt:
init.addedHint: When it's in place, click "I've added it" in the dashboard.
init.alreadyPresent: ✓ {path} already contains a clauditor knowledge block — left it untouched.
init.loginHint: (Run `clauditor login` to sync this to your team's dashboard.)
sync.errNotConnected: ✗ Not connected to a hub. Run `clauditor login` first.
sync.summaries: ↑ {count} session summary/summaries synced as team memories
common.scanningHeader: Scanning session files for repeating workflows...
common.noSessionsInRange: No sessions found in the last {days} days.
doctor.noIssues: ✓ No cache issues detected across {count} sessions.
doctor.brokenFix: → Run /clear in that session, or start a fresh one.
calibrate.success: ✓ Calibrated: will block at {threshold}x waste, {minTurns}+ turns
calibrate.notEnough: ⚠ Not enough data — using conservative 10x threshold
calibrate.notEnoughHint: Use Claude Code for a few more sessions, then run `clauditor calibrate` again
report.over5x: {count} sessions burned 5x+ more quota than necessary
report.worstCounterfactual: With rotation, this session would have used ~{savedM}M tokens instead of {actualM}M
report.impactBlocked: Blocked {count} session{plural} from burning more quota
report.impactRotation: With rotation on all sessions: {withM}M tokens instead of {actualM}M
report.buggyVersion: ⚠ {count} session{plural} ran on Claude Code 2.1.69-2.1.89 (known cache bug)
report.buggyDetail: This bug causes 10-20x token burn from broken prompt caching.
report.buggyFix: Fix: upgrade to v2.1.91+ with claude update
time.header: Token Usage by Hour — last {days} days
time.peakMultiplierHi: Peak multiplier:   {x}x (peak hours cost {x}x more per turn)
share.header: My Claude Code usage this week (via clauditor):
share.rotation: • With session rotation: {m}M tokens ({pct}% less quota)
share.blocked: • clauditor blocked {count} session{plural} before they burned more quota
sessions.spikes: ⚠ {count} token spike{plural} detected (largest: {max}k tokens in one turn, avg: {avg}k)
knowledge.footer: Knowledge accumulates automatically as you use Claude Code.
suggestSkill.noneHint: Use Claude Code for a few more sessions — patterns emerge over time.
suggestSkill.enableAuto: To enable automatic suggestions, run: clauditor install
suggestSkill.enableAutoHint: Claude will offer to create these skills at session start.
handoffReport.errNoTranscript: No transcript found. Specify one with --transcript <path>
handoffReport.errNoHandoff: No recent handoff found. Specify one with --summary <path>
handoffReport.noFacts: No verifiable facts found in the transcript.
dashboard.howItWorks: clauditor tracks tokens/turn as your session grows.
dashboard.howItWorksThreshold: At {threshold}x waste ({minTurns}+ turns), it saves context and blocks. {calStatus}
block.title: clauditor: Session using {waste}x more quota than necessary
block.perTurn: Each turn uses {waste}x more quota than when this session started.
block.startFresh: Start fresh: run `claude` — clauditor will inject your previous session context.
block.orContinue: Or press Enter to continue in this session (not recommended).
continue.copyHint: To continue, copy and paste this:
continue.command: read {path} and continue where I left off
continue.orElse: Or type something else to start fresh.
continue.multiCommand: → read {path} and continue where I left off
continue.multiFooter: Copy one of the → lines above, or type something else to start fresh.
install.conflict: {event}: ⚠ existing hook with same matcher "{matcher}" found — adding clauditor alongside it
install.calibrated: Session rotation: ✓ calibrated — blocks at {threshold}x waste, {minTurns}+ turns (from {sessions} sessions)
install.conservative: Session rotation: ✓ enabled — using conservative 10x threshold (will auto-calibrate after more sessions)
install.nothingToRemove: No hooks configured — nothing to remove
